subcodes.first_line: O Candle of the gathering of divine knowledge! One among the blessed souls hath, in his published epistle, [mentioned] thy name, O spiritual beloved one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محفل عرفان نفسی از نفوس مبارکه در ورقه منشوره اش نام آنحبیب روحانی را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @the power of words; of speech, @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
